itemListElement.reviewBody:
Govt Passport Kendra application also seeks such (pic added) NOC for Aadhar details. But spartan management doesn't. They just decide on behalf of the parents and label parents as 'ugly'.
Those interested in knowing more, can ping me personally.

Children here are exposed to verbatim that's not appropriate for certain age groups.

Issues discussed in private will be announced in public events.

Parents will be bombarded with messages to follow 'the so called' insta account.

Teachers ask parents to contact the HM, but he never answers calls.

They have least interest in feedback and govt. instructions.

Any learned parent who goes with a feedback or irresistible complaint will be labled as 'bad'.

School events are used as forums to deliver most disgusting and unwarranted speeches to parents.
They claim to be a school with Christian discipline, but rules are different for insiders. Typically hypocrital culture.

One can notice extreme pride and down trend of the institution.

May be the effect of generation change where unqualified, inexperienced, (self) over estimating leadership is the concern.

The set of experienced and empathetic teachers are retiring or being replaced by dishonest and inefficient teachers.

Heard one of the old teachers is even insisting that students should keep buying gifts for the teachers. May be she's not satisfied with the pay 😄.

Aspects that are foundation to a school, empathy, open to feedback culture, inclusiveness are missing at Spartan Exclusive School.

All this is subject to my interaction with school, some teachers' views (who shared with me in person), parents who are highly competitive (with high performance expectations from students and school).

Overall, Spartan Exclusive is not how it used to be many years ago.

My daughter has been studying in Spartan for 5 years now and I m amazed to see her transformation as a good responsible human being, over the years. Today she often surprises me with her point of views, her empathy and respect towards others, her extraordinary confidence and not leaving aside, her playfulness. The school has an amazing culture like no other; and has value education and activity based curriculum at its core.  The teachers are so warm and courteous; and they are indeed the strong pillars of this Joyful Spartan Family😊. It is no doubt that my daughter is going to carry a lot of wonderful memories/experience from this school.

Hi, My daughter Hannah R joined class 4-A this year in Spartan. At beginning we thought this school is also like other big schools and my daughter will be one among them.
But SPARTAN taught us our thinking is completely different and they told each and every kid is important as thier own child.

We witnessed throughout the year my daughter was so enthusiastic and she told us she loves this school than her previous one. She never got much opportunity though she was in very small crowd in her previous school

Here when she is among such a big crowd everyday she comes with some energetic involvements and she enjoy to core to studying here.

She is involved not only in ACADEMICS but she got herself explored and could bring lot of new interests and talents in her which as a parents we are also not able to found all these days.

As a mother i used to encourage to bring some new talents in her but she always gives up.  But what i seen in SPARTAN is that she herself coming forward to represent with lot of CONFIDENCE that she can do things.

I saw principal and correspondant ma'am is so down to earth when it comes to each and every kid and they treat everyone equally without any partiality. Especially the teachers i should mention here ,the day the school began i handed over my kid with tears as how will she manage this crowd . Her class teacher promised me that she will take care. Yes I acknowledge that firmly that they doing that endlessly with all kids. I especially thank all the subject teachers of my daughter who were really helpful when ever I wanna reach them .They were so calm & never shown their all day tiredness towards us .

I have seen the quality of sports day, Annual day , project display day and Carnival day. All had unique presentation which made me to say my daughter is blessed to be a part of SPARTAN now.

As i heard so many times when principal ma'am says that SPARTAN IS NOT ONLY FOR ACADEMICS BUT IT IS ALSO FOR OTHER EXTRA CURRICULAR ACTIVITIES . THEY FIND NEW OPPORTUNITIES AND BRING OUT THE UNIQUE TALENTS OF EACH AND EVERY KIDS .

Spartan Matric is an Excellent School. All Students are Well Talented not Only in Studies But also in Extra Curricular Activities. All Teachers in This School are Experienced in Teaching and they Teach their Best Ways. All Students will Always Stand Outstanding from any Other Schools. Teachers will Always be there to help Students and Discipline in Spartan is Very Outstanding .Spartan is a Best School.

The great Malcolm X once said, ‘’Education is our passport to the future, for tomorrow belongs to the people who prepare for it today.’’ and Spartan helps children get ready for whatever tomorrow might bring. Spartan is the best school I have ever known. This
beautiful place of knowledge, imagination, curiosity and entertainment is like a second home, run by our beloved Founder and Principal, Mrs. Anna Jacob and Mrs. Sara Alexander. Both of them have worked really
hard to make this school a fulfilment. Children are frequently given life lessons by them, which are very beneficial and needed in day-to-day life. In addition, they teach the cost of discipline, simplicity, courage, responsibility, unity and so much more.
They also have friendly teachers who help their students navigate through their life better. They inspire them in so many ways and mould them to be better citizens of the nation. They also make learning effective and amusing at the same time by engaging them in games and quizzes. Displaying photographs and videos while teaching has really helped them remember their
lessons better. They also are regularly given
assignments that help them escape from their minds and get creative. They also teach art, soft skills, logical reasoning, moral science, computer science, general
knowledge, skating, karate, public speaking, music and diverse sports.
Every year, there’s an exciting location to visit. Children always long for that day to enjoy. They take them to museums, amusement parks and so on.Every December, the school provides presents to the needy. During the Christmas Celebrations, our dear Founder and Principal hand over money to the physically and mentally challenged. Even during the Annual Celebrations, gifts are given to those who need it.
I am very thankful to all who are a part of this student developing institution.

Vidya
Mother of Gratia Juliet- VIII C
